trivia_bullets.text: Originated in Scourge (2003); this M21 printing is one of at least 8 over its lifetime — Scourge, Commander 2011, Duel Decks: Elves vs. Inventors, Archenemy, Masters 25, Double Masters, Commander Masters, Foundations. Reprint depth signals sustained format relevance across two decades.
sources: Gatherer: Fierce Empath printings (via WebSearch snippet)
MTGAssist: Fierce Empath sets (via WebSearch snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: EDHREC rank 2,063 — standout of this batch. One of the most-played uncommon tutors in Commander. ETB tutors any creature mana value 6+ to hand. Creature status enables abuse via blink, recur (Genesis), and sacrifice outlets. Community sentiment on MTGSalvation Commander forums rates its recursion-ceiling above non-creature tutors like Green Sun's Zenith.
sources: MTGSalvation Commander EDH forum: Fierce Empath thread (via WebSearch snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: No flavor text on the M21 printing (Scryfall flavor_text absent). Legal in Pauper and PauperCommander per Scryfall legalities — extends reach beyond Commander into budget formats.
Art by Johann Bodin, Swedish freelance illustrator and concept artist.
